zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey de Neville於大約1145年出生在英國林可爾史爾霍卡斯特爾時，他的父親Gilbert de Neville61歲，母親Philicia de Damoys48歲。他於大約1175年與Emma de Bulmer在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1193年9月29日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾霍卡斯特爾享年49歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾霍卡斯特爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

meanings: Irish: variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevils
meanings: English: variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Novel

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill
meanings: English and Irish (or Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey de Neville was born about 1145, in Horncastle, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Gilbert de Neville, was 61 and his mother, Philicia de Damoys, was 48. He married Emma de Bulmer about 1175, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 29 September 1193, in Horncastle, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49, and was buried in Horncastle, Lincolnshire, England.

Il a épousé Emma de Bulmer environ 1175, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 29 septembre 1193, à Horncastle, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Horncastle, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

ko.Raby with Keverstone, Durham, England: 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 라비 위스 케버스톤
ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Neville(이)가 대략 1145년 영국 링코실르 호른카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert de Neville(은)는 61세였고, 그의 어머니 Philicia de Damoys(은)는 48세였다. 그는 대략 1175년 영국에서 Emma de Bulmer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1193년 9월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 호른카스틀에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 호른카스틀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey de Neville nasceu aproximadamente 1145, em Horncastle, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Gilbert de Neville, tinha 61 anos e sua mãe, Philicia de Damoys, tinha 48 anos. Ele casou-se com Emma de Bulmer aproximadamente 1175, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 29 de setembro de 1193, em Horncastle, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Horncastle, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Raby with Keverstone, Durham, England: раби вит кивирстоун, дурам, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey de Neville родился около 1145 г. в местности хаурнкастл, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Gilbert de Neville было 61 год, а матери, которую звали Philicia de Damoys, 48. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma de Bulmer около 1175 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 29 сентября 1193 г. в местности хаурнкастл, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности хаурнкастл, линколншир, Англия.
